title: Chapter 1, Scene 1 Prose Brief — False-Morning Routine (Initial Pages)
summary: Intent brief for Scene 1 prose: onboard the reader into Ada's lived world through a texture-bearing false-morning wake-and-prepare sequence. This is a reward scene — make the reader want to stay before introducing wrongness. Seven-beat structure from clock-numerals-in-the-dark through threshold departure.

narrative.notes: Scene 1 core mission: easy to enter, pleasant to inhabit, rich in atmosphere, quietly characterizing, lightly intriguing, not rushed. Success criteria: reader feels oriented, comfortable, interested in Ada, able to picture the setting, subtly aware of night-shift life, eager to continue into the drive scene. Key avoid list: overplaying time motif, backstory dumping, over-description lists, premature mystery mechanics. Opening candidate: red clock numerals in the dark. Pacing: linger but do not drift. This is a prose discovery draft — prioritize finding lived rhythm, Ada's actual voice, and right degree of atmosphere over polish.

rewardTokens.description: Warm lamp-lit home, false morning, amber quiet — texture-bearing and inhabitable.
Ada's practiced pre-shift ritual communicates discipline and routine without exposition.
Reader-Ada trust bond forms through interior proximity and direct voice.
